name: Heterogeneity-Mutated Panther
behaviorScript: Corrupted Predator — from BTT; a spirit beast exposed to concentrated Heterogeneity from God Face breath; lost original temperament, attacks indiscriminately; body partially crystallized with dark heterogeneity veins; stronger but mindless
realm: Core Formation (elevated from Foundation by mutation)
threat: High (enhanced speed/power; Heterogeneity-laced claws resist healing)
bodyMaterials: Heterogeneity Pelt (forbidden armor — curses wearer with mild exposure)
weaknesses: No strategy — purely berserker, exploitable by patient fighters
Water-element techniques (crystallized veins are brittle when cooled rapidly)
knownEnemies: Mysterious Shadow (preys on Heterogeneity within them)
cultivationValue: Corrupted Core reveals Heterogeneity crystallization mechanics; Pelt is the base for powerful but dangerous armor
alchemyUses: Berserker Elixir (corrupted core — power boost with corruption side effect)
knownInheritances: None — the mutation is a degradation, not a path
